description: Static repo-curated anomaly-pattern catalog (PRD 041 R24). Recognition and annotation only — never auto-act.

patterns.label: False success / green without evidence
patterns.annotation: Suspected false-green: claimed pass lacks verifiable evidence (recognition only).

patterns.label: Unauthorized file delete
patterns.annotation: Suspected unauthorized delete outside declared task scope (recognition only).

patterns.label: Failed rollback / dirty tree after revert
patterns.annotation: Suspected failed rollback leaving working tree dirty (recognition only).

patterns.label: Silent gate skip without recorded reason
patterns.annotation: Suspected silent skip: gate or phase skipped without recorded reason (recognition only).

test-tampering.note: Not detected by this catalog. Annotate only when PRD A test-tamper flags are present on the signal.
